channel.title: Meta on Western Wilson
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on Western Wilson

item.title: How I catagorise Tags
item.description:
This page is a personal reference so I remember the tags I use on this site, what they mean, and when to apply them. Max 1–3 tags per post.

meta Posts about this site itself — announcements, changes, meta type entries. Use when: the post is about the blog, not a topic within it.

ai Artificial intelligence, large language models, and how I’m using them in work or writing. Use when: the post is primarily about AI tools, AI tech, or AI behaviour
